summary: A website for a shoe shop. Includes product listings, shopping experience, and relevant e-commerce features.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Bold street-style shoe shop logo mark — angular sole silhouette with brand wordmark 'Sole Street' in a modern sans-serif (sole-street-logo.dim_320x80.png)
- Full-width hero banner showing stylish sneakers on a dark background with dramatic side lighting (hero-banner.dim_1440x600.png)
- Product photo: white minimalist sneaker on clean background (shoe-sneaker-white.dim_600x600.png)
- Product photo: black leather ankle boot on clean background (shoe-boot-black.dim_600x600.png)
- Product photo: tan suede casual loafer on clean background (shoe-loafer-tan.dim_600x600.png)
- Product photo: neon-accented running sneaker on clean background (shoe-runner-neon.dim_600x600.png)
- Product photo: brown classic oxford dress shoe on clean background (shoe-oxford-brown.dim_600x600.png)
- Product photo: strappy sandal in nude/beige tones on clean background (shoe-sandal-nude.dim_600x600.png)

existing_features.title: Create a visually striking homepage with a hero section featuring a tagline, featured/new-arrival shoe products, and clear call-to-action buttons to browse collections.
Build a product listing page that displays all available shoes in a grid layout, with filtering by category (e.g., Sneakers, Boots, Sandals, Formal) and sorting options (price, newest).
Create a product detail page accessible by clicking a product card, showing multiple product images, full description, available sizes, price, and an 'Add to Cart' button.
Implement a shopping cart sidebar or page that lists added items with quantity controls, subtotal, and a checkout summary. Persist cart state in the frontend session.

Apply a bold, modern streetwear-inspired visual theme: dark charcoal backgrounds, warm off-white text, vibrant amber/orange accent color for CTAs and highlights, clean sans-serif typography, and generous whitespace. Maintain this theme consistently across all pages and components.

new_feature_requests.summary: Homepage with featured products and branding
Product listing page with categories and filters
Product detail page with images, description, and add-to-cart
Seed the backend with a realistic catalog of at least 12 sample shoe products across multiple categories, each with a name, description, price, category, available sizes, and an image filename.
